archetype: Jewel & Luxury (Adapted for Restaurant Dark Mode)

typography.instructions: Use Outfit for all headings and numbers (prices, table number, order total). Use Manrope for body text, descriptions, and smaller labels. Do not use Inter.

customer_mobile.header: Sticky top with backdrop blur (bg-background/80). Contains Logo/Name and Table # badge.
customer_mobile.category_tabs: Horizontal scrolling sticky under header. Use snap-x mandatory for smooth tab scrolling.
customer_mobile.menu_list: Vertical bento style. grid-cols-1 or grid-cols-2 on slightly wider screens. p-4 to p-6 spacing.
customer_mobile.cart_bar: Fixed bottom floating action bar. Z-index 50. shadow-[0_-10px_40px_rgba(255,107,0,0.15)].

admin_desktop.strategy: Desktop optimized, high data density, dashboard feel.
admin_desktop.sidebar: Fixed left sidebar. 1A1A1A background, subtle right border (border-border).
admin_desktop.live_orders_kanban: grid-cols-5 (Pending, Confirmed, Preparing, Ready, Served). Strict column widths. h-full with internal scrolling.
admin_desktop.menu_management: Table or Grid view for items with distinct image thumbnails.

cards.shadow: shadow-none (flat dark mode aesthetic) but subtle glow on hover for interactive cards.
cards.menu_item: flex flex-row or flex-col. Use rounded-2xl. Image taking up 1/3 to 1/2 of space.

buttons.primary: bg-[#FF6B00] text-white hover:bg-[#E65A00] rounded-xl font-bold transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-[#2A2A2A] text-white hover:bg-[#3A3A3A] rounded-xl font-semibold transition-all
buttons.outline: border border-[#FF6B00] text-[#FF6B00] hover:bg-[#FF6B00]/10 rounded-xl font-semibold

badges.table: bg-[#FF6B00]/10 text-[#FF6B00] border border-[#FF6B00]/20 px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-sm font-bold

components.kanban_card: bg-[#0F0F0F] rounded-xl border border-[#2A2A2A] p-4 flex flex-col gap-3 cursor-grab active:cursor-grabbing

motion.page_transitions: Fade in with subtle 10px vertical lift (Framer Motion).
motion.drawer: Slide up from bottom on Customer Cart. spring transition with low stiffness.
motion.list_items: Staggered entrance for menu items and kanban cards.
motion.hover_states: All buttons must have subtle scaling (active:scale-95) and color shifts.
motion.toast_notifications: Use Sonner. Dark theme toasts with orange/green accents depending on success/info.

icons_and_assets.library: lucide-react for all utility icons. Phosphor Icons for distinct UI adornments.
icons_and_assets.nonveg_indicator: Square with a triangle or circle inside (Red #EF4444).

media.instructions: Use these images for seeding the menu database and for hero/placeholder assets in the dashboard.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: MANDATORY: All interactive elements (buttons, inputs, menu items, cart toggles, kanban cards) MUST have a data-testid attribute. E.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='checkout-button', data-testid='admin-login-submit'.
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on #FF6B00 meets at least 3:1 contrast for large elements. If not, darken the orange slightly on hover.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install Google Fonts 'Outfit' and 'Manrope' in index.html.
Setup Tailwind config with background, surface, and brand colors defined above.
Implement Sonner for toast notifications across the entire app.
Build the customer menu as a Mobile-First layout. Use a fixed bottom bar for the cart summary.
Build the Admin Live Orders board as a horizontally scrolling Kanban container on desktop.
Use Framer Motion for the Cart Drawer (sliding up from bottom) and Kanban card transitions.
Ensure WebSockets push real-time updates to the Kanban board, and new orders trigger a notification sound and visual flash (e.g., border glowing #FF6B00).
Implement data-testid attributes on all interactive components.
